payload.exit_reason: implementation_complete
payload.completion_summary: WP-2026-152 implemented: repaired request-changes requeue handoff. _handle_request_changes() now derives pending_requeue from events[-1], not second latest_event() read. Added explicit UNKNOWN/READY_FOR_REVIEW/IN_PROGRESS/fallback branching. Generic IN_PROGRESS without changes antecedent fails closed. UNKNOWN falls back to execution_log. Bridge stderr logging for failed --request-changes preserved. Tests: 7 passed (5 requeue tests + 2 logging tests). Quality gates: ruff OK, pytest OK, validation OK. Supervisor dedupe/relaunch policy deferred to future WP.

Fase 2: Smoke tests añadidos verificando polling continuo despues de requeue y respeto de timeout/idle timeout. Tests: 72 passed en test_supervisor.py, 319 passed en pytest-safe. Ruff y pip-audit limpios.
